name: minimalstdlib
postCreateCommand: apt-get update && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends lcov gdb gdb-multiarch valgrind strace ltrace && git clone https://github.com/stephanfr/minimalclib.git ${containerWorkspaceFolder}/../minimalclib && make -C ${containerWorkspaceFolder}/../minimalclib lib native
